name: security-settings
title: Solid Security Settings
description: Solid security settings tabs for sessions, linked accounts, passkeys, and API keys.

files.content:
import { useAuth } from "@better-auth-ui/solid" import { Show } from "solid-js" import { ApiKeys } from "@/components/auth/api-key/api-keys" import { DangerZone } from "@/components/auth/delete-user/danger-zone" import { ActiveSessionsSettings } from "@/components/auth/settings/security/active-sessions" import { ChangePasswordSettings } from "@/components/auth/settings/security/change-password" import { LinkedAccountsSettings } from "@/components/auth/settings/security/linked-accounts" import { hasAuthPlugin } from "@/components/auth/settings/shared/helpers" import type { SecurityCardsPlugin } from "@/components/auth/settings/shared/types" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" export type SecuritySettingsProps = { class?: string } export function SecuritySettings(props: SecuritySettingsProps = {}) { const auth = useAuth() return (
{auth.plugins.flatMap((plugin) => { const securityCards = (plugin as SecurityCardsPlugin).securityCards as | SecurityCardsPlugin["securityCards"] | undefined return securityCards?.map((SecurityCard) => ) ?? [] })}
) }
